---
title: "Solution 04 — Tests Nextflow avec nf-test"
format: html
toc: true
---

## Solution — Test de process

```groovy
nextflow_process {
    name "Test COUNT_LINES"
    script "../../pipelines/minimal/modules/count_lines.nf"
    process "COUNT_LINES"

    test("TSV valide → count et summary produits") {
        when {
            process {
                """
                input[0] = [
                    [id: "records"],
                    file("${projectDir}/../../data/records.tsv")
                ]
                """
            }
        }
        then {
            assert process.success
            assert process.out.count.size() == 1
            assert process.out.summary.size() == 1

            def count_val = path(process.out.count[0][1]).text.trim().toInteger()
            assert count_val == 20

            assert snapshot(process.out.count).match()
        }
    }

    test("fichier vide (en-tête seul) → process échoue") {
        when {
            process {
                """
                input[0] = [
                    [id: "empty"],
                    file("${projectDir}/../../data/empty.tsv")
                ]
                """
            }
        }
        then {
            assert process.failed
        }
    }
}
```

## Solution — Test de workflow

```groovy
nextflow_workflow {
    name "Test PROCESS_TABLE workflow"
    script "../../pipelines/minimal/workflows/process_table.nf"
    workflow "PROCESS_TABLE"

    test("TSV valide → count, summary et stats produits") {
        when {
            workflow {
                """
                input[0] = Channel.of([
                    [id: "records"],
                    file("${projectDir}/../../data/records.tsv")
                ])
                """
            }
        }
        then {
            assert workflow.success
            assert workflow.out.count.size() == 1
            assert workflow.out.stats.size() == 1

            def count_val = path(workflow.out.count[0][1]).text.trim().toInteger()
            assert count_val == 20

            def stats_lines = path(workflow.out.stats[0][1]).readLines()
            assert stats_lines[0] == "group\tmean\tn"
            assert stats_lines.size() == 3

            assert snapshot(
                workflow.out.count,
                workflow.out.stats
            ).match()
        }
    }
}
```

## Points clés

- `process.success` / `process.failed` — état du process
- `process.out.channel_name` — accès aux sorties par nom
- `path(process.out.count[0][1]).text.trim().toInteger()` — lire et convertir le contenu
- `snapshot(...).match()` — comparaison par hash SHA256
- `${projectDir}` — chemin racine du pipeline (défini par nf-test)

## Gestion des snapshots

```bash
# Créer au premier run
nf-test test --update-snapshot

# Les snapshots sont dans :
training/tests/nf-test/count_lines.nf.test.snap
training/tests/nf-test/process_table.nf.test.snap
```

Ne jamais accepter un changement de snapshot sans relire le diff.
